postprocess gate has same-source dE/ds, Gamma_ss(q), pole derivative, FV/IR control

verdict: The exact positive-side FH/LSZ route is now explicit: same-source production dE_top/ds and same-source scalar D'(pole) remove the source-coordinate normalization freedom by the invariant product (dE/ds)*sqrt(D'_ss).  This does not set kappa_s=1.  Retained closure still requires completed seed-controlled production data, response stability, a valid pole/model-class/FV/IR postprocess, and an independent certificate that the measured source pole is the canonical Higgs radial mode.  Those gates are not passed on the current PR #230 surface.
